title: Contacts Application
content: A contacts management app I built in Angular. It handles adding, editing, deleting, and searching contacts, with a card-based layout and a persistent sidebar form for quick entry. The data layer runs on Firebase.

images.caption: Dashboard Screen: The main contacts view — card layout showing name, company, email, phone, and document ID for each contact. Edit and delete controls are in the top-right of each card. The header shows the total contact count.

Add Contact Screen: A split-screen layout with the Add Contact form open in the left panel alongside the existing contacts list. Fields include name, email, company, phone, and description, with cancel, clear, and add actions.
New Contact Added: The same split-screen view after adding a contact — the right panel now shows three cards and the header count has updated. The form stays open for consecutive entries.
